channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Israel threatens ‘full force’ response if Iran fires missiles towards it  The Guardian
  3. Jerusalem said preparing to join fight with Iran as US weighs next steps  The Times of Israel
  4. Analysis • As Iranian missiles edge closer to Israel, Netanyahu awaits Trump's green light  Haaretz
  5. Israel must stay out of the latest Iran-US fighting  The Hill

item.title: We're ready to make any Russian move cost far more than it's worth — NATO military chief in exclusive interview - The Kyiv Independent
item.description:
1. We're ready to make any Russian move cost far more than it's worth — NATO military chief in exclusive interview  The Kyiv Independent
  2. How Nato is preparing for European conflict with Russia in 2030  The Times
  3. NATO Planning for War with Russia – but has Moscow Left the Door Open?  Royal United Services Institute (RUSI)
  4. OPINION: The Trojan Horse Has Arrived: How Russia Can Disrupt NATO Without Invading  Kyiv Post
  5. On The Ground: Inside NATO’s eastern flank as Russia’s shadow war intensifies  Washington Times

item.title: UK's Burnham drops digital ID scheme to prioritise cost of living, say allies - Reuters
item.description:
1. UK's Burnham drops digital ID scheme to prioritise cost of living, say allies  Reuters
  2. Burnham to scrap digital ID to focus on 'helping with cost of living'  BBC
  3. Burnham to scrap Starmer’s digital ID scheme in ‘reset of priorities’  The Guardian
  4. How Andy Burnham will start: digital ID axed, cabinet post for AI  The Times
  5. Andy Burnham latest: Labour deputy leader explains decision to scrap digital ID  The Independent

item.title: Canada Orders 190 More LAV 6 ACSV Vehicles for $1.4B, Same Platform Already Sent 124 Units to Ukraine With 35 More Promised in 2026 - Defense Express
item.description:
1. Canada Orders 190 More LAV 6 ACSV Vehicles for $1.4B, Same Platform Already Sent 124 Units to Ukraine With 35 More Promised in 2026  Defense Express

item.title: China Hopes 'Straw Checkerboards' Will Keep Desert at Bay - Newser
item.description:
1. China Hopes 'Straw Checkerboards' Will Keep Desert at Bay  Newser
  2. China Planted Billions of Trees and Scientists Just Found an Unexpected Advantage of These New Forests  ZME Science
  3. Since 1978, China has planted 66 billion trees to hold back two deserts, and the planted forest is now gaining leaf cover faster than the country's natural woodland  Space Daily
  4. Scientists issue desert warning in China despite success of the ‘Green Great Wall’  AOL.com
  5. The Great Green Wall: Billions of trees seem to be growing faster than average  MassLive

item.title: CIA Director Says AI Drones Reduce Russian Recruits’ Battlefield Lifespan to Minutes - Kyiv Post
item.description:
1. CIA Director Says AI Drones Reduce Russian Recruits’ Battlefield Lifespan to Minutes  Kyiv Post
  2. Russian troops survive just 20-30 minutes on Ukraine’s front lines, CIA director says  Defense News
  3. CIA Says AI Drones Give Russian Troops Only 30 Minutes to Live  Bloomberg.com
  4. Russian troops survive an average of 30 minutes on the Ukrainian battlefield, CIA director says  Business Insider
  5. Ukraine war briefing: Russian soldiers ‘survive only 30 minutes on battlefield’  The Independent

item.title: Turkey Aims to Offload Russian Air-Defense System as It Seeks to Buy U.S. F-35s - WSJ
item.description:
1. Turkey Aims to Offload Russian Air-Defense System as It Seeks to Buy U.S. F-35s  WSJ
  2. Turkey Unlikely to Get F-35 Fighter Jets Even If It Sells Russian S-400s to UAE or Qatar, Israeli Analyst Warns  EurAsian Times
  3. Turkish lawmaker expects progress on S-400 dispute  Caliber.Az
  4. Turkey convinced Trump wants to avoid sanctions over S-400  spacewar.com
  5. Turkey Takes Centre Stage with UAE, United States, Russia and Qatar as S-400 Transfer Talks Put Emirates, Qatar Airways Routes and Middle East Air Travel Confidence Under Watch  Travel And Tour World
